2398100.name: ЭОН
2398100.description:
Maksim Semyonov arrives at the "Volga" preparatory camp for a three-week stay. But for him, this is more than just a summer course—it’s a chance for a fresh start. Will Maksim seize this opportunity... or will he go to any lengths to uncover who stole his past?

EON is an interactive visual novel. Only you can decide the fate of Maksim and the people close to him.

Plot:

<DATA DELETED>

Game Features:

  • The plot of the game is huge: to explore the whole plot and get a complete picture of what happened, you have 6 full-fledged routes with multiple endings, as well as 5 secondary stories that complement and decorate the main story. That's over 200 hours of reading in the 21 game day.

  • The novel covers various themes and genres, but the main ones are science fiction, romance and everyday life. This summer adventure has a place for both hilarious pranks with unexpected consequences and missed opportunities without a happy ending. Choose your path carefully.  

  • A big ship needs a big torpedo! Of course, such a great novel cannot do without a huge number of illustrations from our artists! In the game, you will find dozens of backgrounds and their variations, hundreds of CGS and more than twenty characters with their own sprites! No static, almost all visual content will be animated!

  • Legendary industry composers and sound designers are responsible for caressing your ears while reading, and the number of planned tracks exceeds a hundred!

  • Boys and girls at this age are prone to various stupid things, be it pulling pigtails, funny name-calling and other manifestations of mutual sympathy for each other. We cannot ignore this important stage in the life of yesterday's teenagers, but we assure you that mutual flirtations and their expected results in no way harm the plot of the novel. Everything is in its place — in some cases these are funny moments to amuse the reader, in other cases they are an important element of conveying the mood of the scene.

A demo version awaits you this year!

  • The first three game days will be available, with a total duration of more than five hours of reading.

  • You will find out how it all started and in what position our hero found himself at the time of arrival at the camp.

  • You will get to know most of the characters who will accompany our hero on a long adventure during this camp shift.

  • The Unity will allow us to use a wide variety of audio-visual tools to enhance the gaming experience.

  • A substantial part of the game locations will be involved.

  • More than 50 event CGs will immerse you into the world of the game.

Setting: 

The events of the game take place in the near alternate future, specifically in 2032. In the prosperous state of the Union, camps for applicants like the Volga are commonplace. Young men and women who have just graduated from school choose their preferred field of study - their "squad" — and during a three—week shift they must successfully create a project that will help them enroll in university. Volga is one of the most advanced camps sponsored by the All—Union University of Physics and has great technological capabilities for exploration projects. Located on a picturesque riverbank, SOL Volga offers residents not only production facilities, but also extensive leisure opportunities after hard work. In addition, the program of stay includes various squad events and competitions aimed at rallying the team and preparing researchers for student life.

Characters:

Maksim Semyonov

The main character of the novel, who came to the camp as a simple prospector, but was forced to hide the secret of his past.

Sasha Givental

A girl with a complicated personality — sometimes it's easier to get a tree to talk than to establish contact with her. A mathematical genius, she easily solves the most difficult problems, but categorically does not know how to get along with people.

Polina Sokolova

The most noticeable girl in the camp, it is her emerald hair and pointed ears that attract the attention of everyone around her. She is very responsible and purposeful, does not like idlers.

Marina Sidorova

An expert on alien conspiracies and anomalous phenomena. Hyperactive and never discouraged, she, like no one else, likes to test the patience of others with various tricks and inventions.
Nastya Mironova

A quiet and modest, but very romantic girl who likes to take care of plants, and spends most of her time in the camp greenhouse. Always happy to invite guests for tea and a pleasant conversation.

Nika Startseva

The most mysterious girl in the camp. She's hard to find, easy to lose, and impossible to understand until you get the rest of the novel's endings.

Ersy
A virtual assistant girl who accompanies the main character everywhere and helps him get comfortable in the camp. Sometimes she looks so much like a real girl that you want to shake hands with whoever developed her code.

And other characters…

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
